extra.reason: Fixed post-session web errors from Reanimated dependency arrays and keep-awake teardown race.
Completed live English translation setting, protocol support, transcript rendering, and tests.
Feedback examples now use target-language corrections, vocabulary, and lesson-plan phrases; whitespace-only user turns return low-score feedback instead of failing.
Voice session input now sends a one-time Bidi text instruction asking the agent to open the roleplay before streaming microphone audio.
Refreshed the frontend UI with a cleaner, more polished visual system and verified it in the browser.
Box HTTP errors now include status/reason and actionable messages; reproduced local 401 as expired/invalid developer token.
Logged original voice WebSocket exceptions with traceback and added regression coverage.
Classified Nova Sonic 'System instability detected' as a transient provider failure and returned a retry-oriented client message.
Configured Nova Sonic with explicit stable inference defaults, supported client_config region, and regression coverage.
Suppressed secondary agent.stop cleanup failures and classified Bedrock DNS/connectivity errors for voice sessions.
